test_cases.title: Create user returns 201 with id and createdAt
test_cases.description: POST /users with a valid name and job creates a user and returns 201 with an id and a createdAt timestamp.
test_cases.automation_decision_reason: This is a server-side contract: a POST that returns a specific status and response shape. There is no UI to exercise; an API test verifies the contract deterministically. Per docs/automation-decision-model.md, data-shape and status-code checks belong at the API level.
preconditions: The API base URL is configured via the Postman environment (reqres.in).

steps.action: POST to /users with a JSON body.

test_cases.title: Register with missing password is rejected
test_cases.description: POST /register with an email but no password returns 400 with an error message — reqres.in's documented missing-field failure mode.
test_cases.automation_decision_reason: Negative validation case at the API contract level: a missing required field must be rejected with 400 and a clear error. Negative API validation is a primary use of automate_api per docs/automation-decision-model.md.
preconditions: The API base URL is configured via the Postman environment (reqres.in).

steps.action: POST to /register with only an email field.

expected_results: Response body contains an 'error' field mentioning the missing password.
